description: rank each cluster against sibling SKILL.md descriptions via local embeddings (top-k cosine similarity)
rules: read-only — reads cluster summaries and the frontmatter of every */SKILL.md under SKILLS_DIR
load_skill_descriptions only keeps skills whose frontmatter has both name and description
top_k_matches embeds each cluster query + each skill description and ranks by cosine similarity
production embedder is local sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) — no data egress
falls back to a deterministic stdlib hashing embedder when sentence-transformers is absent so ranking still runs offline
matches written to record_store as matches.json
usage: Set CLUSTERS (clusters.json) and SKILLS_DIR (the skills/ dir). Optional: TOP_K (default 5). Output: matches.json.
limitation: Real semantic ranking needs sentence-transformers installed (~80 MB model downloads on first use); the offline fallback embedder is a coarse lexical proxy, not semantic.
